2606.22995.title: Group-Graph Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agentic Reinforcement Learning
2606.22995.paper_summary: Group-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) has significantly enhanced Large Language Models (LLMs) in agentic scenarios. To achieve finer-grained policy updates, recent agentic RL frameworks have shifted from trajectory-level to step-level training. However, long-horizon agentic RL suffers from severe reward sparsity and delay, as feedback is often deferred for dozens of interaction steps. While existing step-level frameworks refine training granularity, their credit assignment remains coarse-grained and still treats agent exploration as isolated, linear trajectories. This oversimplified perspective ignores the inherent graph structure of state transitions, leading to high-variance state-value estimation and myopic, localized credit assignment. To overcome these critical bottlenecks, we propose Group-Graph Policy Optimization (G2PO), a novel group-based RL algorithm tailored for multi-turn agentic tasks. G2PO explicitly transforms linear interaction trajectories into a global state-transition graph. By aggregating identical observations across different trajectories, we introduce group-aggregation state-value estimation that reduces sampling variance and trajectory-dependent bias. Furthermore, we redefine agent actions as transitions between state nodes and propose an edge-centric advantage estimation strategy. By globally standardizing Temporal Difference (TD) errors across the entire graph, G2PO explicitly identifies and prioritizes critical transitions that drive absolute task progress. Extensive experiments on representative long-horizon benchmarks-WebShop, ALFWorld, and AppWorld-demonstrate that G2PO substantially outperforms state-of-the-art prompt-based and RL baselines, achieving remarkable success rate improvements of up to 22.2% over GRPO.
2606.22995.paper_summary_zh: 群體基礎的強化學習（RL）顯著提升了大型語言模型（LLMs）在代理情境中的表現。為了實現更細緻的策略更新，近期的代理RL框架已從軌跡級別轉向步驟級別的訓練。然而，長期代理RL面臨嚴重的獎勵稀疏和延遲問題，因為反饋通常在數十次互動步驟後才會給出。儘管現有的步驟級別框架改善了訓練的細緻度，但它們的信用分配仍然是粗糙的，並且仍將代理探索視為孤立的線性軌跡。這種過於簡化的觀點忽略了狀態轉換的內在圖結構，導致高方差的狀態價值估計和短視的局部信用分配。為了克服這些關鍵瓶頸，我們提出了群體圖策略優化（G2PO），這是一種針對多回合代理任務的新型群體基礎RL算法。G2PO明確地將線性互動軌跡轉換為一個全局狀態轉換圖。通過聚合不同軌跡中的相同觀察，我們引入了群體聚合狀態價值估計，這減少了取樣方差和依賴於軌跡的偏差。此外，我們重新定義代理行動為狀態節點之間的轉換，並提出了一種以邊為中心的優勢估計策略。通過在整個圖中全局標準化時間差（TD）誤差，G2PO明確識別並優先考慮推動絕對任務進展的關鍵轉換。在具有代表性的長期基準-WebShop、ALFWorld和AppWorld上進行的廣泛實驗表明，G2PO在性能上顯著超越了最先進的基於提示和RL的基準，成功率提升高達22.2%，超越GRPO。
2606.22995.author: Yunan Wang et.al.
2606.22995.authors: Yunan Wang, Minghui Song, Zihan Zhang, Shaohan Huang, Haizhen Huang, Furu Wei, Weiwei Deng, Feng Sun, Qi Zhang
